command:
/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics import DihedralGroup
D3 = DihedralGroup(3)
P = D3.presentation()
print('domain generators:', D3.generators)
print('presentation generators:', P.generators)
for n, r in enumerate(P.relators):
    print(n, r, 'array_form=', r.array_form, 'len=', len(r))
    print('letters=', [r[i] for i in range(len(r))])
    print('members=', [r[i] in P.generators for i in range(len(r))])
PY

git blame -L 310,350 -- sympy/combinatorics/homomorphisms.py

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import DihedralGroup
D3 = DihedralGroup(3)
P = D3.presentation()
print('domain generators:', D3.generators)

    print(rel, rel.array_form, list(rel))

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics.free_groups import free_group
from sympy.combinatorics.fp_groups import FpGroup
F, a, b = free_group('a,b')
G = FpGroup(F, [a**2])
for group in (F, G):
    print(type(group).__name__, hasattr(group, 'relators'), group.generators)
    if hasattr(group, 'relators'):
        print(group.relators)
PY
